set.body: Round 4 H4 lint pass (rule P13) flagged 46 tryCatch handlers that return a plain fallback (character(), list(), NULL, etc.) without inspecting conditionMessage(e) or conditionClass(e) and without re-throwing. ~10 are in backend-registry.R, chol-factor.R, qr.R and are genuinely NEW beyond the existing amatrix-e4w subspace-SVD case. Broad signal: amatrix silently swallows user-thrown stop() from nested calls. Follow the amatrix-e4w remediation pattern <e2><80><94> require handlers to re-raise unless the class is a known fallthrough class.
set.title: [bug] Blanket tryCatch fallbacks mask real errors <e2><80><94> ~10 sites across backend-registry/chol-factor/qr.R
